common.title: Nguyen Dinh Nguyen
common.description:
This little corner is where small things begin—just enough to keep me from feeling FOMO in the face of all the big things happening out there as AI evolves so quickly. 
 It’s also a place where I can introduce myself, share my perspectives and what I’ve learned—so I can easily look back on it later, and maybe it’ll be useful for anyone who happens to stop by and take a look.
common.experience_desc: Here’s a bit about my experience—with just a few humble years working as a "culi".
common.homelab_desc: Here are a few random things about prod & infra self-host...
common.hero_description: I build scalable backend systems and high-performance data pipelines — from architecture design to production deployment.

experience.meta_description: Portfolio and work experience of Nguyen Dinh Nguyen — Developer & Data Engineer specializing in scalable backend systems and high-performance data pipelines.
experience.hero_description: I build scalable backend systems and high-performance data pipelines — from architecture design to production deployment. Experienced in distributed systems, Data Lakehouse, and CI/CD automation.
experience.hero_bio: Building scalable backend services and data pipelines, optimizing performance & ensuring system reliability.
experience.section_experience_subtitle: A few humble years grinding as a "culi"
experience.exp1_desc: Built the core data collection framework aggregating international trade & company data from multiple global sources. Designed Data Vault models for the logistics domain and automated pipelines with Apache Airflow & Spark processing ~100M records/batch, delivering to PostgreSQL and Elasticsearch.
experience.exp2_desc: Implemented an automated large-scale data collection system handling 500K–2M records per region. Designed Airflow orchestration workflows with Python parsing, integrated AWS S3 storage, and engineered high-performance crawlers with fault tolerance and proxy rotation.

bookmarks.meta_description: A dashboard for saving, searching, filtering, and managing bookmarks by nested categories.
bookmarks.subtitle: Save useful links with titles, descriptions, and nested categories. Search fast, filter by topic, and manage everything from one focused workspace.
